subcodes.first_line: O thou who art sacrifice of sacrifices and devoted in the path of the peerless Beloved! For verily the friends are in peril at every moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای قربان قربانی و در راه دلبر یکتا فداای هر آن زیرا یاران هر دم در خطری
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @martyrs and martyrdom
